nasb.text: By the abundance of your trade You were internally filled with violence, And you sinned; Therefore I have cast you as profane From the mountain of God. And I have destroyed you, O covering cherub, From the midst of the stones of fire.

esv.text: In the abundance of your trade you were filled with violence in your midst, and you sinned; so I cast you as a profane thing from the mountain of God, and I destroyed you,  O guardian cherub, from the midst of the stones of fire.

cnv.text: 因你的貿易昌盛， 你中間就充滿了強暴的事， 你也犯了罪， 所以我把你當作污穢之物， 從　神的山把你拋棄。 護衛寶座的基路伯啊！我要把你 從閃耀如火的寶石中除掉。

ccb.text: 因为贸易发达， 你便充满暴力，犯罪作恶。 因此，看守约柜的基路伯天使啊， 我把你当作污秽之物逐出我的山， 从闪闪发光的宝石中除掉你。
